B1.name: Bee Stripe Mini Bag
B1.description: Bold yellow-and-black striped crochet mini bag with a chain strap. A cheerful statement piece handcrafted for everyday elegance.
B1.material: Premium chunky cotton-blend yarn with metal chain strap

B2.description: A timeless blue handcrafted mini bag with soft texture and artisan charm, sized perfectly for your essentials.

B3.description: An elegant party-ready crochet bag designed for evening occasions. Structured silhouette with premium finish.

B4.name: Pearl White Party Bag
B4.description: Sophisticated party bag with intricate crochet detailing — perfect for weddings, dinners, and special events.

B5.name: Oreo Swirl Signature Bag
B5.description: Signature black-and-white swirl crochet bag with a bold, modern aesthetic inspired by classic contrast.

B6.name: Oreo Classic Signature Bag
B6.description: A refined take on the Oreo signature line — structured, versatile, and unmistakably Zrochet.

B7.name: Chic Urban Side Sling
B7.description: A sleek side-sling crochet bag with a relaxed silhouette — perfect for hands-free days and effortless street style.

B8.name: Blush Side Crossbody
B8.description: Soft-toned side bag with artisan crochet texture — lightweight, versatile, and made to move with you.

B9.name: Artisan Top-Handle Bag
